panels.title: Faults activos AHORA
panels.description: Eventos fault.* con value>0 en último sample. Cuenta de averías en curso.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: Faults inyectados (24h)
panels.description: Total eventos fault.* iniciados en últimas 24h.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: MTBF (h, último 7d, todas aulas)
panels.description: Mean Time Between Failures: ventana_horas / num_faults. Mayor = sistema más fiable.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: 168.0 / float(v: r._value) }))

panels.title: Aulas afectadas (7d)
panels.description: Aulas distintas con al menos 1 fault en la ventana. % aulas problemáticas.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: Distribución por tipo (7d)
panels.description: Proporción de cada tipo: sensor_drift / valve_stuck / fan_failure / refrigerant_low.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> group(columns: ["variable"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

panels.title: Faults timeline (severidad por evento)
panels.description: Cada punto = evento fault. Y-axis = severity (0.3-1.0). Color = tipo.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "variable", "asset_id"])

panels.title: Top aulas por # faults (7d)
panels.description: Aulas más problemáticas con desglose por tipo. Click para drill-down.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id", "variable"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["asset_id"], columnKey: ["variable"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: Severity media (faults activos)
panels.description: Severity media de los faults en curso. >0.7 = críticos, atender primero.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> group()
  |> mean()

panels.title: Fault rate (eventos/día rolling)
panels.description: Tendencia de inestabilidad: subida sostenida = degradación HVAC.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state_events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.variable =~ /^fault\./)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 6h, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 6h, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) * 4.0 }))
